title: Voting
audio_feedback_record_hint: Use your microphone to record feedback for this participant.
audio_feedback_preview_hint: Review the recording before sending it.
audio_feedback_secure_context_error: The microphone can only be used from HTTPS or localhost.
audio_feedback_permission_error: The browser does not have permission to use the microphone. If no prompt appears, that permission was already blocked before or the page is being opened inside an app. Open the link in Chrome or Safari and review the site permissions.
audio_feedback_device_not_found_error: No microphone was found on this device.
audio_feedback_device_busy_error: The microphone is being used by another application or cannot be read right now.
audio_feedback_constraints_error: The browser could not initialize audio recording with this device.
audio_feedback_microphone_error: The microphone could not be accessed.
audio_feedback_delete_confirm: Are you sure you want to delete this audio feedback?
alert_criteria: You must fill in all criteria before sending the votes.
confirm_no_show_text: This action will set all criteria scores to 0 for this participant. Are you sure you want to continue?
confirm_outlier_scores: Some scores are significantly above or below average. Are you sure you want to send these scores?
reserve_alert: You are a reserve judge. You can only vote for participants who have a judge as their coach.
judge_head_penalties_tooltip: You are the head judge: you can apply penalties in this competition.
